rows.label: tev013702_MSG0001
rows.name:
Are you familiar with the xenoform
named Doctor B who lives on the
outskirts of the industrial district?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013702_MSG0002
rows.name:
Who is he? Do you have any
idea what he's doing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013702_MSG0003
rows.name:
I mean, he buys lots of parts
from me, and I'm grateful to
have him as a customer...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013702_MSG0004
rows.name:
But his orders have left me baffled as to what
he's trying to build. And when I ask about his
work, I end up more confused than when I started.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013702_MSG0005
rows.name:
There's just so much I don't understand, and
it makes me a little uneasy... Like, when
exactly did he even start living here in NLA?[ST:wait ]
